ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the actor */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the actor's agent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the actor in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the actor in kilograms */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the actor */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color of the actor */,
  "union_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the actor is a member of a union */,
  "union_membership_number" TEXT /* Union membership number of the actor */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the character is associated with */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the character */,
  "physical_description" TEXT /* Detailed physical description of the character */,
  "personality_traits" TEXT /* Key personality traits of the character */,
  "backstory" TEXT /* Brief backstory of the character */,
  "is_lead_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the character is a lead role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the project */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the project was released */,
  "production_company" INTEGER /* Production company responsible for the project */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director of the project */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Name of the writer of the project */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the project */,
  "box_office_earnings" REAL /* Box office earnings of the project */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the project */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the project in minutes */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_production_company FOREIGN KEY ("production_company") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor performing the role */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character associated with the role */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project where the role is performed */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary for the role */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract for the role */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract for the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., lead, supporting, cameo) */,
  "is_main_character" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a main character */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  "contract_version" TEXT /* Version number of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the contract */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the contract */,
  "contract_file" TEXT /* File path to the contract document */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  "contract_version" TEXT /* Version number of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract is due for renewal */,
  "payment_schedule" TEXT /* Payment schedule for the contract */,
  "clause_details" TEXT /* Additional details about specific clauses in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the production company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the production company was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the production company's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the production company's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast credit */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor receiving the credit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project where the credit is given */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the project */,
  "billing_order" INTEGER /* Order of billing for the actor in the project */,
  "credit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the credit */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit (e.g., main, supporting, special thanks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_credits_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_credits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_genres" (
  "project_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-genre association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  "is_primary_genre" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is the primary genre of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_genres_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., headshot, promotional, full-body) */,
  "usage_rights" TEXT /* Information about the usage rights of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_images_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., poster, still, behind-the-scenes) */,
  "usage_rights" TEXT /* Information about the usage rights of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_images_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the CCMS */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user in the CCMS */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)
